reasoning.typography: MD IO monospaced typeface creates authentic developer identity. The code editor aesthetic is disciplined and purposeful, not cosplay.
reasoning.hierarchy: Single dominant portrait, minimal text. Clear line-numbered structure creates obvious reading order. Could push density further but the restraint works.
reasoning.distinctiveness: This is unmistakably a developer's site — the README.md metaphor, code editor UI, file tree navigation. Swap the words and it falls apart immediately.
reasoning.color: Near-monochrome dark theme with perfect restraint. Blue file highlight is the only accent. No decorative color pollution.
reasoning.density: Confident emptiness in the code editor paradigm, though the sparse bio text in an ocean of numbered lines walks the line between intentional and underutilized.
reasoning.voice: Brilliant structural concept: personal site AS literal README file in a code editor. The IA is the concept. Navigation is file system. This is how you do metaphor.

winning_patterns: README.md as literal site structure — concept and execution unified
Code editor UI isn't decoration, it's the entire navigational paradigm
Monospaced typography commitment creates authentic technical voice
File tree navigation (README, Notes, Stories, Newsletter, Photos) feels native
Line numbers, timestamps, character counts — all functional metadata treated as design
anti_patterns: Bio text density could be higher — lots of empty numbered lines feel wasteful
The metaphor might confuse non-technical visitors (though this may be intentional filtering)
